displayTitle: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #14: The Warrior Princess, Part 2
synopsis: When the royal court of Eiattu 6 came to Rogue Squadron to collect their princess (Plourr Ilo, who was unaware of her heritage), they did so to help put an end to their planet's internal rebellion. They reasoned that a strong figurehead might pull the people together. What they couldn't know was that a strong-willed princess might have her own view of how things should be run.
title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #14: The Warrior Princess, Part 2
